title: Luffy Shares His True Dream
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Sabo, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Yamato, Luffy as Luffy reveals his true dream to the crew while world events around Sabo, Lulusia, and the Government signal a dangerous new stage.
scene: Luffy reveals his true dream to the crew while world events around Sabo, Lulusia, and the Government signal a dangerous new stage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way in hell!! This is a lie!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He'd never kill Vivi's dad!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: SABO WOULDN'T DO SOMETHING LIKE THIS IN A MILLION YEARS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm with you there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The revolutionary army is against the world nobles, not regular kings.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: "revolutionary Army declares war on celestial dragons"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "King cobra of Arabasta Assassinated by revolutionary Chief of Staff, SABO - "

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "His daughter, Princess VIVI, is missing -"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Set course for Arabasta! Right now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like I've been saying, what good is that gonna do?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The man's dead... Besides, VIVI was last seen at Mary Geoise!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Then let's go there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huh?! what?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are we headin' to Mary Geoise?! Not good! Damn it, it's too muffled to hear!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You moron!! That's the den of the enemy!! You wanna take on Navy HQ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Damn straight!! What's wrong, zero? You chicken?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Gyaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: > Summer down!!! I'm just saying we don't have any leads!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: UWAA! Where are you, VIVI-CHYAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: PLEASE BE SAFE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: VIVI'S DAD IS DEAD?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Thank you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But he was so nice, even to us pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeah! He was the best King around!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ugh, I'm torn between worrying about VIMI and worrying about how she's taking ALL this...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems like this year's Reverie was quite tumultuous.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the same bro we met in dressrosa, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never known anyone to be discontent with the way arabasta is ruled...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't take it anymore!! VIVI, where are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That does it!! We're gonna go save her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Let's do it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: All of you, knock it off!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy! Remember what you said about ace that one time?

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Ace has his own adventures.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You trusted him to make his own way up until the point where he actually needed help...

summary: This part advances the New Era After Wano through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
